# Dicas Advisor Group

> Full-service professional advisory firm serving New Jersey. Bilingual English/Spanish. Specializing in tax preparation, immigration administrative services, Medicare enrollment, LLC formation, real estate, notary, payroll, credit counseling, and trademark registration.

## About

Dicas Advisor Group is a professional advisory organization based in New Jersey, United States. We serve individuals, families, and small businesses throughout New Jersey, with a strong focus on the Hispanic and Latino community. All services are available in English and Spanish.

Our mission is to consolidate personal life, business, and family needs under one roof with comprehensive 360° advisory.

**Location:** New Jersey, USA
**Languages:** English, Spanish
**Website:** https://dicasadvisor.org

---

## Services

### Tax Preparation & Accounting (Taxes & Contabilidad)
Strategic tax management for individuals and small businesses in New Jersey.
- Personal tax preparation (Form 1040)
- Self-employed taxes (1099 / Schedule C)
- Tax amendments (1040X)
- ITIN application and renewal
- Strategic tax planning
- Monthly bookkeeping
- Income and expense reports
- IRS letter assistance
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/taxes-contabilidad

### Payroll Services (Payroll & Nómina)
Payroll management for small businesses and LLCs in NJ.
- Payroll processing for small businesses
- Salary and withholding calculations
- W-2 and 1099 form preparation
- Detailed payroll reports
- Basic labor compliance advisory
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/payroll

### Medicare & Health Insurance (Medicare & Seguros de Salud)
Certified specialists in the New Jersey insurance market.
- Medicare enrollment
- GetCoveredNJ registration
- ACA Health Insurance Marketplace plans
- Dental, vision, and hearing insurance
- Accident and cancer insurance
- Medicaid eligibility assistance
- Plan renewals and changes
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/medicare-seguros

### Immigration Administrative Services (Servicios de Inmigración)
Administrative assistance for USCIS immigration packages. Note: We are not attorneys and do not provide legal advice.
- Family petitions (I-130)
- Status adjustment (I-485)
- Work permits (I-765)
- Affidavit of Support (I-864 / I-864A)
- Citizenship (N-400)
- Consular processes (NVC / DS-260)
- FOIA requests
- USCIS package preparation
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/inmigracion

### Notary & Document Services (Notaría & Documentos)
Fast and reliable notarization and document management services.
- Notary public services
- International and domestic document management
- Translation coordination
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/notaria

### LLC & Business Formation (Creación de LLC & Negocios)
Complete business setup for entrepreneurs in New Jersey.
- LLC state registration
- EIN application with the IRS
- Operating agreement guidance
- Business bank account setup guidance
- Ongoing compliance advisory
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/servicios-empresariales

### Trademark Registration (Registro de Marca)
Protect your brand identity with USPTO trademark registration assistance.
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/registro-marca

### Credit & Financial Consulting (Crédito & Finanzas)
Education and strategies to improve your financial and credit profile.
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/credito-finanzas

### Real Estate — NJ Realtor (Bienes Raíces)
Expert guidance for buying or selling real estate in New Jersey.
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/bienes-raices

### Medical Administrative Billing (Servicios Médicos Admin)
Specialized assistance with medical billing and insurance claims.
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/medico-administrativo

### Wedding Officiant (Ministro de Bodas)
Civil ceremony officiants for personalized weddings in NJ.
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/ministro-bodas

### General Administrative Services (Multiservicios)
Comprehensive administrative support for any need.
**URL:** https://dicasadvisor.org/servicios/multiservicios

---

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Business type:** Professional advisory / multiservice firm
- **Jurisdiction:** New Jersey, United States
- **Target audience:** Individuals, families, small businesses, Hispanic/Latino community in NJ
- **Languages:** English and Spanish (fully bilingual)
- **Tax services:** IRS-compliant, individual and business
- **Immigration:** Administrative assistance only, not legal representation
- **Insurance:** NJ certified insurance specialists
- **Real estate:** Licensed NJ Realtor
- **Response time:** Within 24 business hours
- **Privacy:** Client data protected under high-security protocols

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Dicas Advisor Group a law firm?**
A: No. Dicas Advisor Group provides administrative and advisory services. Immigration services are administrative assistance only. We are not attorneys and do not provide legal advice.

**Q: Are services available remotely?**
A: Yes. Many services are available remotely for clients across the United States.

**Q: Does Dicas Advisor Group serve non-Spanish speakers?**
A: Yes. All services are available in English and Spanish.

**Q: How quickly can I get a response?**
A: Dicas Advisor Group commits to contact within 24 business hours.
